title: Integrate EU CORDIS (CC BY) + UKRI Gateway to Research (OGL) funders
context: An open, source-linked map of the Ewing Sarcoma research ecosystem (organizations, grants/awards, research efforts, aggregate registered-study records, and public outputs). The second slice integrates EU CORDIS (CC BY 4.0) and UKRI Gateway to Research (OGL) funders, honoring attribution obligations. Binding cancer guardrails: open-access / aggregate / organization-/award-level data ONLY -- no controlled-access (dbGaP, EGA), no individual-level biobank/clinical data, no identifiable patient data; proprietary research-intelligence databases (Dimensions/WoS/Scopus/Candid) are out of scope; no medical advice or clinical interpretation. See PLAN.md.
objective: Integrate CORDIS and UKRI GtR funder records via their approved channels with recorded CC BY/OGL attribution and full provenance.
acceptanceCriteria: EU CORDIS (CC BY 4.0) and UKRI Gateway to Research (OGL) funder records integrated only via their approved allow-list channels.
CC BY / OGL attribution strings recorded and surfaced; per-source license honored.
100% of assertions carry resolvable provenance (source URL + license + retrievedAt) and pass the CI gate quartet.
Only organization/award/effort-level fields stored; no patient/individual-level data (reviewer verifies).
output: data/cordis-ukri/ integrated CORDIS + UKRI GtR funder records, committed via PR.
